summary.intent: Fix repeated sandbox package installs (dpkg processes visible in htop with no logs) by adding observability logging and a provisioning guard to prevent redundant apt-get runs.
summary.outcome: Implemented all 5 planned changes across docker.rs and host.rs: provisioning guard with HashSet<String>, debug/info logging at all key decision points, docker build stdout logging, and full provision_packages output capture. All 216 sandbox tests pass and lib clippy is clean.

repo: DockerSandbox.ensure_ready() is called on every tool exec — idempotent by design but causes repeated provisioning under failure conditions
The retry path in exec.rs:634-659 calls cleanup() + ensure_ready() on container death, triggering the full pipeline including apt-get
When startup pre-build fails, is_prebuilt=false causes provision_packages() to run on every new container
Pre-existing clippy errors exist in task_list.rs test code — unrelated to sandbox changes
cargo fmt has pre-existing diffs in code-index, gateway, and qmd files — not in sandbox files

code.finding: ensure_ready() decision points: early return if container running (~320-322), docker run (~352), is_prebuilt decision (~368)
build_image() only logged stderr on failure — stdout was silently discarded on both success and failure
resolve_local_image() had no logging when image found locally
provision_packages() used 2>&1 | tail -5 shell pipe, discarding most output and conflating stdout/stderr

workflow: cargo clippy --lib excludes test code, useful for isolating pre-existing test lint issues from new changes
cargo fmt --check on a specific package (-p moltis-tools) confirms only your files are clean without being blocked by repo-wide formatting debt

friction: Pre-existing clippy errors in task_list.rs test code required running clippy with --lib to confirm no regressions in the changed code
Pre-existing cargo fmt diffs in unrelated files (code-index, gateway, qmd) required scoping fmt check to moltis-tools only
open_items: The provisioning guard (HashSet on DockerSandbox) only prevents redundant provisioning within a single DockerSandbox instance lifetime — does not persist across process restarts
Pre-existing clippy warnings in task_list.rs test code were not fixed as they are out of scope
Repo-wide cargo fmt issues in code-index, gateway, and qmd files were not addressed
Manual QA with RUST_LOG=moltis_tools=debug not performed in transcript — only automated tests were run
